purpose: Deterministic content and interaction model for Stitch refinement and a subsequent code-based interactive prototype.

design_decisions.filters: All filter families directly visible in left pane; searchable; values open in nested flyouts; no global Apply button.
design_decisions.preview: Right-side overlay drawer that does not resize the queue.

shortcuts.action: Focus filter panel and enter filter-navigation mode
Close flyout or drawer; exit active keyboard mode
Move through filter families or flyout values

systems.label: AI & automation systems
systems.resource: AI prompt, index, or agent workflow

risk_types.label: Sensitive data exposure
risk_types.title: Sensitive data exposed through {system}
risk_types.action: Restrict exposure immediately, preserve evidence, and notify the data owner.

risk_types.label: Unusual data access
risk_types.title: Unusual access pattern detected in {system}
risk_types.action: Validate business justification and review access history.

risk_types.label: Suspicious activity / compromise
risk_types.title: Suspicious activity detected in {system}
risk_types.action: Revoke risky sessions and investigate linked identities or devices.

risk_types.label: Risky external sharing
risk_types.title: Sensitive resource shared externally from {system}
risk_types.action: Remove external access and verify whether content was downloaded.

risk_types.label: Abnormal data movement / exfiltration
risk_types.title: Abnormal data movement detected from {system}
risk_types.action: Block the transfer and validate downstream movement.

risk_types.label: Misconfiguration / over-permission
risk_types.title: Over-permissioned or exposed configuration detected in {system}
risk_types.action: Restore least-privilege configuration and validate affected resources.

risk_types.label: Privilege abuse / insider risk
risk_types.title: Potential privilege misuse detected in {system}
risk_types.action: Preserve logs, validate business purpose, and restrict access if needed.

risk_types.label: Data integrity / destructive activity
risk_types.title: Destructive activity detected in {system}
risk_types.action: Contain the actor or workload and initiate recovery validation.

risk_types.label: Compliance / policy violation
risk_types.title: Policy violation detected in {system}
risk_types.action: Correct the policy breach and document the disposition.

risk_types.label: AI data leakage / unsafe automation
risk_types.title: Unsafe AI data handling detected in {system}
risk_types.action: Pause the AI workflow and review retained prompts, indexes, or agent actions.

preview_schema: Item identity and urgency: type, stable ID, title, severity, priority, status, assignee, SLA
Grouping rationale for cases or correlation status for standalone alerts

source_notes: Microsoft Defender incident queue: priority score, explainable summary pane, filters, impacted assets, generated names, customizable and reorderable columns.
Google Security Operations SOAR: queue sorting, case metadata, alert counts, list/compact views, case merging.
Splunk Enterprise Security: urgency combines detection severity with asset or identity priority.
NIST SP 800-61 Rev. 3: rapid and effective response reduces data loss, service disruption, and enterprise impact.
